home.heroSub: Namso scopes your business problem, matches you with the right applied AI builder, and delivers automation systems that actually work.
home.heroTrust: Vetted builders · Secure escrow · Pay after approval

problem.title: AI is everywhere. Clarity isn't.
problem.p1Desc: Every vendor promises transformation. Most deliver confusion.
problem.p2Desc: You know AI matters, but you don't know what to build first.
problem.p3Desc: Ideas without implementation stay ideas. You need builders, not buzzwords.

solution.title: We turn overwhelm into execution.
solution.desc: Namso is the operating layer between your business problems and AI execution. We scope the work, match you with the right builder, and deliver systems that actually run.

process.title: Four steps. Real results.
process.step1Desc: Tell us what's slowing your business down — bottlenecks, manual work, missed opportunities.
process.step2Desc: Namso scopes the work and connects you with the right applied AI builder for your project.
process.step3Desc: Your matched builder implements the system — automations, workflows, copilots, integrations.
process.step4Desc: The system works. Trust builds. You come back for the next one.

principles.title: How we operate.
principles.p1Desc: Vetted builders, secure payments, no empty promises.
principles.p2Desc: We deliver working systems, not slide decks.
principles.p3Desc: Simple process, transparent pricing, real outcomes.
principles.p4Desc: The right builder matters more than the right software.

trust.title: Designed for serious businesses.
trust.t1Desc: Funds held securely until you approve the delivered work.
trust.t2Desc: Every builder is reviewed and verified before joining the platform.
trust.t3Desc: Starting prices upfront. No hidden costs, no surprises.
trust.t4Desc: Request changes until the system works exactly as scoped.

finalCta.title: Ready to stop experimenting and start building?
finalCta.desc: Tell us what's slowing your business down. We'll scope the project and match you with a builder who can deliver.
finalCta.footer: Free to start · No commitment · Pay only after approval

services.workflow_automation_desc: Automate repetitive workflows by connecting tools and eliminating manual processes across your business.
services.workflow_automation_outcome: Save hours every week and reduce operational errors.
services.chatbot_lead_capture_desc: Deploy AI chatbots to capture leads, handle support inquiries, and engage website visitors 24/7.
services.email_communication_desc: Automate inbox management, email flows, and internal communication processes.
services.email_communication_outcome: Less inbox time, faster responses, clearer communication.
services.website_conversion_desc: Improve website performance with AI-driven automation and optimized lead flows.
services.website_conversion_outcome: Higher conversion rates and automated lead capture.
services.data_intelligence_desc: Organize and automate data pipelines to improve operational efficiency and decision-making.
services.data_intelligence_outcome: Clean, automated data that drives better decisions.
services.research_analysis_desc: Build systems that collect, analyze, and deliver actionable business insights automatically.
services.research_analysis_outcome: Faster, deeper insights without manual research.

about.heroSub: We help businesses go from AI confusion to working systems.
about.missionText: Namso exists to close the gap between business problems and AI execution. We scope the work, match the right builder, and deliver systems that actually run — so businesses can stop experimenting and start operating.
about.storyText1: Most businesses know AI matters. But the market is noisy, the tools are changing fast, and finding someone who can actually implement — not just advise — is harder than it should be.
about.storyText2: We built Namso to fix that. One platform where businesses describe their problem and get matched with applied AI builders who deliver real systems. No hype. No guesswork. Just execution.
about.whoText: Namso serves businesses that want to use AI but need a trusted partner to scope, build, and deliver. We also serve applied AI builders who want meaningful project work without the overhead of client acquisition.

values.resultsDesc: Every project is measured by what it delivers, not what it promises.
values.fairDesc: Secure escrow, honest pricing, and clear scope protect everyone involved.
values.forwardDesc: We build for the businesses that will lead tomorrow, not the ones stuck in yesterday.
values.communityDesc: We invest in our builders because their quality defines our reputation.

about.learnMoreSub: See how Namso works or get in touch with our team.

howItWorks.heroSub: We scope your problem, match you with the right builder, and deliver working systems. Here's how.

1.title: Describe Your Problem
1.desc: Tell us what's slowing your business down — bottlenecks, manual processes, missed opportunities. We'll help you define the right starting point.

2.title: We Scope & Match
2.desc: Namso scopes the work into a clear brief and connects you with a vetted applied AI builder who fits your project.

3.title: Your Builder Delivers
3.desc: Your matched builder implements the system — automations, workflows, copilots, integrations — with clear milestones.

4.title: Approve & Scale
4.desc: Review the delivered system. Pay only after you approve. Come back for the next one as results compound.

securePayments.title: Designed for Trust
securePayments.sub: Every project on Namso is protected by secure escrow payments and structured milestone delivery.

cards.escrowDesc: Funds are held securely until you review and approve the completed work.
cards.approvalDesc: You decide when the work meets your expectations before any funds are released.
cards.disputeDesc: If something doesn't go as planned, our team steps in to ensure a fair outcome.

benefits.title: Why businesses choose Namso
benefits.item1: No hiring overhead — get matched with the right builder
benefits.item2: Operator-led scoping — we define the brief with you
benefits.item3: Pay only after you approve the delivered system
benefits.item4: Vetted builders with applied AI experience
benefits.item6: Compounding value — build trust, come back for more

browseServices.title: What We Help Build
browseServices.sub: These are common systems businesses ask us to scope and deliver. Every project starts with a conversation — not a cart.
browseServices.secureNotice: All projects include secure escrow payments. You only pay after you approve the delivered work.
browseServices.customCtaDesc: Every business is different. Tell us your problem and we'll scope a solution.

bookCall.heroTitle: Let's map out your next AI project.
bookCall.heroSub: Whether you need a high-level strategy or help identifying specific tasks, our experts are here to guide you.

strategy.title: Strategy Call
strategy.desc: Perfect if you want to explore how AI can transform your business at a macro level. We'll discuss use cases, ROI, and overarching architecture.

task.title: Task Identifier Call
task.desc: Best if you know you need help but aren't sure how to break it down. We'll help you scope specific, actionable tasks ready to go on the marketplace.

form.title: Book Your Session
form.goals: What are your main goals and challenges?

success.title: Request Received
success.desc: Thank you for booking a call. Our team will review your details and reach out within 24 hours to schedule a time that works for you.

freelancer.heroTitle: Join Namso as an AI Specialist
freelancer.heroDesc: Apply to join our marketplace and start working with businesses worldwide. Use your AI expertise to deliver real solutions, build your reputation, and grow your freelance career.
freelancer.idealFor: Ideal for professionals experienced with tools like ChatGPT, Zapier, Make, n8n, Notion AI, Airtable, Google Workspace, and other AI platforms.
